name: cta
description: A focused call-to-action banner: a headline, optional supporting line, and one primary action (plus an optional secondary). Used to close a page or a section of the funnel.

responsive.lg: Centered content capped at the reading measure.

a11y.headingLevel: h2 — a CTA never claims the page h1.
notes: Exactly one primary action; the secondary is visibly subordinate.
Action labels are specific ("Start free trial"), never generic ("Click here").

elementor.notes: A centered container, optionally on an accent-subtle background.

mapping.layout.center: Centered inner container capped at the measure
mapping.actions: Clustered buttons that wrap on small screens
